creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks for report, but it didn't contain enough information to proceed. 
When it happens again, please describe what you were doing (running 
sysinstall? running ezjail-admin? running freebsd-update?), what 
the options where you picked (which FTP server) and what you expected 
to see (well that's obvious here :-)
